title: Force Control Error Codes
description:
Force Control Error Codes

Force Control Error Codes

To get help for any SPEL+ error, place the cursor on the error message in the run or command windows and press the F1 key.

No.	Message	Remedy	Note 1	Note 2

1112	Force files were not found.	Rebuild the project.

1290	Force Monitor Failure.

Force monitor number is out of the allowable range.	Reboot the controller.

Initialize the controller firmware.

Replace the controller.

1291	Force Monitor Failure.

The force monitor is already used.	Check whether another PC is using the force monitor.

2548	Too many force files.	Reboot the controller.

Initialize the controller firmware.

Replace the controller.

2549	The force file is used by another robot.	Reboot the controller.

Initialize the controller firmware.

Replace the controller.

2600	MassProperties number is out of range.	The MassProperties numbers that can be specified are from 1 to 15.

Please review the program.

2601	MassProperties number is not defined.	Please confirm the setting of MassProperties.

Please review the program.

2602	Cannot clear a MP while in use.	MP of the Occupied cannot be cleared.

Please confirm whether MP is a Occupied.

2603	Cannot clear MP number '0'	MP-number 0 cannot be cleared.

Please review the program.

2847	There is a wrong setting in the dip switch setting of the force sensor I/F unit.	It is necessary to change the dip switch setting.

Please inquire with us.

2848	The force sensor I/F unit to which the force sensor is registered is not connected.	Please confirm whether it is possible to connect it with force sensor I/F unit correctly.

2849	Failed in the confirmation of the force sensor connection information.	Please confirm whether it is possible to connect it with force sensor I/F unit correctly.

2850	Failed in the acquisition of the force sensor connection information.	Please confirm whether it is possible to connect it with force sensor I/F unit correctly.

2851	The force sensor is not corresponding to registration.	The serial number of the sensor connected with the registered sensor is not corresponding.

Please exchange it for a new sensor after confirming the connection, returning to the connected sensor, or invalidating the sensor.

2852	The registerd force sensor is not connected.	Please confirm whether it is possible to connect it with the registered sensor correctly.

Please invalidate the sensor when you do not connect the sensor.

2853	The force sensor I/F unit Init Error.

Failed to update the force sensor I/F unit software.	Please review the soft update setting.

Please confirm the connection with force sensor I/F unit.

2854	The force sensor I/F unit Init Error.

Failed to update the force sensor I/F unit software.	Please confirm the file name.

Please confirm the update file.

2855	The force sensor I/F unit Init Error.

Failed to update the force sensor I/F unit software.	Please confirm the power supply and the connection of force sensor I/F unit.

Reboot the controller.

2856	The force sensor I/F unit Init Error.

The force sensor I/F unit is a unsupported version.	The version of the connected force sensor I/F unit is old.

Update the force sensor I/F unit.

2857	The force sensor I/F unit Init Error.

The robot registered in the force sensor I/F unit connection information does not exist.	The robot that relates to the sensor is not registered.

Please review the registrationof the robot or invalidate the robot connection.

2858	The force monitor Error.

Failed to allocate memory.	Reboot the controller.

Please inquire with us if a similar error occurs after rebooting it.

2859	The force log Error.

Failed to allocate memory.	Reboot the controller.

Please inquire with us if a similar error occurs after rebooting it.

2860	The force log Error.

The specified FM number was in use.	The same FM number cannot be specified.

Please specify a different FM number.

2861	The force log Error.

All logs are used.	The greatest log number is used.

Please confirm the number of logs.

3432	Point is not specified.

Or Formula is missing.	Reboot the controller.

Initialize the controller firmware.

Replace the controller.

3433	Boolean type array variable was not specified.	Array which stores a value of Enabled or LPF_Enabled property must be a boolean type array variable in FGet

statement.

Specify a boolean array variable.

3434	Real or Double type array variable was not specified.	Real or Double type array variable is not specified in FGet or MPGet statement.

Specify a real or double type array variable.

3435	Integral type array variable was not specified.	Array which stores a value of Polarities property must be an Integral type array variable in FGet statement.

Specify an integral type array variable.

3436	Timeout value was not specified.	Timeout value is not specified in FCKeep statement.

Specify a proper setting value.

3450	Force Property Name or Result Name was not specified.	Force property name or status name is not specified in FSet, FGet, MPSet, and MPGet statements.

Add a property name or a status name.

3451	Force Property Name or Result Name or Object Name was not specified.	Either of Force property name, status name, or object name is not specified in FSet, FGet, MPSet, and MPGet statements.

Add either of a property name, status name, or object name.

3452	Force Object Name was not specified.	Reboot the controller.

Initialize the controller firmware.

Replace the controller.

3453	Mass Property data was not specified.	Specify a valid Mass Property data.

3454	Force Coordinate System data was not specified.	Specify a valid Force Coordinate System data.

3455	Force Control data was not specified.	Specify a valid Force Control data.

3456	Force Monitor data was not specified.	Specify a valid Force Monitor data.

3457	Force Trigger data was not specified.	Specify a valid Force Trigger data.

3458	Force Control data or Force Coordinate System data was not specified.	Force Control data or Force Coordinate System data is not specified in FCSMove statement. Specify a valid Force Control data or Force Coordinate System data.

3459	Force Guide data was not specified.	Specify a valid Force Guide data.

3460	Force Guide label was not specified.	Specify a valid Force Guide label.

3461	Force Guide data or label was not specified.	Specify a valid Force Guide data or label.

3462	Force Coordinate System data or label was not specified.	Specify a valid Force Coordinate System data or label.

3463	Force Control data or label was not specified.	Specify a valid Force Control data or label.

3464	Force Monitor data or label was not specified.	Specify a valid Force Monitor data or label.

3465	Force Trigger data or label was not specified.	Specify a valid Force Trigger data or label.

3466	Mass Property data or label was not specified.	Specify a valid Mass Property data or label.

3467	Force Coordinate System label was not specified.	Specify a valid Force Coordinate System label.

3468	Force Control label was not specified.	Specify a valid Force Control label.

3469	Force Monitor label was not specified.	Specify a valid Force Monitor label.

3470	Force Trigger label was not specified.	Specify a valid Force Trigger label.

3471	Force Sensor label was not specified.	Specify a valid Force Sensor label.

3472	Mass Property label was not specified.	Specify a valid Mass Property label.

3473	Mass Property label was not specified.	Specify a valid Mass Property label.

3474	Axes was not specified.	Fmag_Axes or Tmag_Axes property setting value is not specified in FSet statement.

Refer to "Fmag_Axes property" or "Tmag_Axes property" and specify a proper setting value.

3475	TriggerMode was not specified.	TriggerMode property setting value is not specified in FSet statement.

Refer to "TriggerMode property" and specify a proper setting value.

3476	Operation was not specified.	Operator property setting value is not specified in FSet statement.

Refer to "Operator property" and specify a proper setting value.

3477	Orientation was not specified.	Orientation property setting value is not specified in FSet statement.

Refer to "Orientation property" and specify a proper setting value.

3478	Polarity was not specified.	Fmag_Polarity, Fx_Polarity, Fy_Polarity, Fz_Polarity, Tmag_Polarity, Tx_Polarity, Ty_Polarity, and Tz_Polarity property setting value is not specified in FSet statement.

Specify a proper setting value.

3609	Duplicate parameter.	Force control data or CF parameter is duplicated in CVMove, FCKeep or other statement for robot motion.

Correct the program.

3815	Parameter for property or status cannot be used from the Command window.	When executing FGet or MPGet statement from a command window, a parameter cannot be specified to a property or status.

Delete the parameter and execute again.

3854	Force file not found.	Failed to read the force file which configures the project.

Check the project folder if the file exists.

3866	Force file has unsupported file format.	Regenerate the force file.

3870	Cannot specify Mass Property data.	Mass property data cannot be specified in FSet, FGet, FDel, and FList statements, FDef, and FLabel$ functions.

Correct the program.

3871	Cannot specify Force Coordinate System data.	Force coordinate system data cannot be specified in Go, BGo, TGo, Jump, Jump3, Mode, BMove, TMove, Arc, Arc3 statement, MPSet, MPGet, MPDel, MPList statement, and MPDef, MPLabel$ function.

Correct the program.

3872	Cannot specify Force Control data.	Force control data cannot be specified in Go, BGo, TGo, Jump, Jump3 statement, and MPSet, MPGet MPDel, MPList statement, and MPDef, MPLabel$ function.

Correct the program.

3873	Cannot specify Force Monitor data.	Force monitor data cannot be specified in MPSet, MPGet, MPDel, MPList statement, and MPDef, MPLable$ function.

Correct the program.

3874	Cannot specify Force Trigger data.	Force trigger data cannot be specified in MPSet, MPGet, MPDel, MPList statement, and MPDef, MPLable$ function.

Correct the program.

3875	Cannot specify Force Sensor data.	Force sensor data cannot be specified in FDel, FList statement, FDef, FLabel$ function, MPSet, MPGet, MPDel, MPList statement, and MPDef, MPLabel$ function.

Correct the program.

3876	Cannot specify Robot.	Robot object cannot be specified in FDel, FList statement, FDef, FLabel$ function, MPSet, MPGet, MPDel, MPList statement, and MPDef, MPLabel$ function.

Correct the program.

3877	Cannot specify Force Control data and Force Coordinate System data at the same time.	Force control data and Force coordinate system data cannot be specified at the same time in FCSMove statement.

Correct the program.

3878	Cannot specify CF parameter.	CF parameter cannot be specified in Go, BGo, TGo, Jump, Jump3.

Delete the CF parameter.

3879	Cannot specify Mass Property label.	Mass property label cannot be specified in MPDel, and MPList statements.

Correct the program.

3880	Cannot specify Force Coordinate System label.	Force coordinate system label cannot be specified in FDel and FList statements.

Correct the program.

3881	Cannot specify Force Control label.	Force control label cannot be specified in FDel and FList statements.

Correct the program.

3882	Cannot specify Force Monitor label.	Force monitor label cannot be specified in FDel and FList statements.

Correct the program.

3883	Cannot specify Force Trigger label.	Force trigger label cannot be specified in FDel and FList statements.

Correct the program.

3884	Cannot specify Force Sensor label.	Reboot the controller.

Initialize the controller firmware.

Replace the controller.

3885	Cannot specify Mass Property data number.	Mass property data number cannot be specified in MPNumber function.

Correct the program.

3886	Cannot specify Force Coordinate System data number.	Force coordinate system data number cannot be specified in FNumber function.

Correct the program.

3887	Cannot specify Force Control data number.	Force control data number cannot be specified in FNumber function.

Correct the program.

3888	Cannot specify Force Monitor data number.	Force monitor data number cannot be specified in FNumber function.

Correct the program.

3889	Cannot specify Force Trigger data number.	Force trigger data number cannot be specified in FNumber function.

Correct the program.

3890	Cannot specify Force Sensor data number.	-

3891	Second parameter data type does not match the first Force Guide data type.	The data type of the first and the second parameter does not match in FDel, FList, MPDel, MPList statements.

Correct the program.

5501	Force control module initialization error.

Reboot the controller.	Reboot the controller.

Initialize the controller firmware.

Replace the controller.

5510	Force control module internal calculation error.

Reboot the controller.	Reboot the controller.

Initialize the controller firmware.

Replace the controller.

5511	Force control module coordinate transformation error.

The end/mid point is out of the motion area.	Check whether the coordinate out of the motion range is not specified.

Check whether the robot moves outside of the motion range during the execution of force control.

5520	Impedance Parameter error.

Check the combination of Spring and Damper and Mass	Check the combination of Spring, Damper, and Mass.

Check whether the Mass property is too small for the Damper property.

5521	Specified Mode Other than Custom Mode of force coordinate system data to force sensor that do not associate robot.

Check the configuration of force sensor.	Check the configuration of force sensor.

Check the force coordinate system object FCS#.

5522	Specified data is not defined.

Check the data.	Check if the specified parameter is defined.

5523	Specified force data cannot continue force control in CF.

Check the force data and force coordinate system data.	Check the force control object and the force coordinate object which are used by the motion commands before and after continuing the force control by the CT modifier parameter.

5530	Timeout error after force sensor reset during force control.

Execute FSet FS#.

Reset command.	Execute FSet FS#.Reset command.

5531	Approached singularity point.

Avoid singularity point.	Check whether the coordinates near the singularity is specified.

Check whether the robot moves to the vicinity of the singularity during the execution of force control.

5532	Buffer for the average force calculation has overflowed.

Shorten the time interval from AvgForceClear to AvgForce.	Shorten the time interval between AvgForceClear and AvgForce to be shorter than a minute.

5533	Timeout error CF duration.

If continue force control then Execute FCKeep.	Check whether the interval of the motion commands is one minute or less.

5540	Force sensor transmission error.

Check connection of the force sensor and force sensor I/F unit.	Execute FSet FS#.Reboot command.

Check connection of the force sensor and force sensor I/F unit.

Reboot the force sensor and force sensor I/F unit.

Please inquire with use if a similar error occurs even after the above countermeasures are taken.

5541	Force sensor reception error.

Check connection of the force sensor and force sensor I/F unit.	Execute FSet FS#.Reboot command.

Check connection of the force sensor and force sensor I/F unit.

Reboot the force sensor and force sensor I/F unit.

Please inquire with use if a similar error occurs even after the above  countermeasures are taken.

5542	Force sensor in use.

Cannot execute the sensor command when other tasks are using the force sensor.	Check whether the Reset property or Reboot property of the force sensor object are executed in another task.

5543	Force sensor communication error.

Reboot the controller.	Execute FSet FS#.Reboot command.

Check connection of the force sensor and force sensor I/F unit.

Reboot the force sensor and force sensor I/F unit.

Please inquire with use if a similar error occurs even after the above countermeasures are taken.

5544	Element error of force sensor.

Reboot the force sensor.

Replace the force sensor.	This error may occur if a long time passed while the Force Sensor is not reset.

Execute FSet FS#.Reboot command.

Check whether force exceeding the rated value is applied to the force sensor.

Reboot the force sensor and force sensor I/F unit.

Please inquire with use if a similar error occurs even after the above  countermeasures are taken.

5545	Circuit error 1 of force sensor.

Reboot the force sensor.

Replace the force sensor.	Execute FSet FS#.Reboot command.

Reboot the force sensor and force sensor I/F unit.

Please inquire with use if a similar error occurs even after the above countermeasures are taken.

5546	Circuit error 2 of force sensor.

Reboot the force sensor.

Replace the force sensor.	Execute FSet FS#.Reboot command.

Reboot the force sensor and force sensor I/F unit.

Please inquire with use if a similar error occurs even after the above countermeasures are taken.

5547	High temperature of the force sensor.

Check the ambient temperature.	Execute FSet FS#.Reboot command.

Check the ambient temperature.

Reboot the force sensor and force sensor I/F unit.

Please inquire with use if a similar error occurs even after the above countermeasures are taken.

5548	Force sensor detects the power of more than rated.

Check the ambient environment of motion.	Execute FSet FS#.Reset command.

Check whether force exceeding the rated value is applied to the force sensor.

Reboot the force sensor and force sensor I/F unit.

Please inquire with use if a similar error occurs even after the above countermeasures are taken.

5549	Force sensor I/F unit is not connected.

Check connection of the force sensor and force sensor I/F unit.	Check connection of the force sensor and force sensor I/F unit.

Reboot the force sensor and force sensor I/F unit.

Please inquire with use if a similar error occurs even after the above countermeasures are taken.

5550	Force sensing of the force sensor is off.

Check the configuration of force sensor.	Check the configuration of force sensor.

Reboot the force sensor and force sensor I/F unit.

5551	Unknown Force sensor is connected. Check connection of the force sensor and force sensor I/F unit.	Check whether the controller firmware supports the force sensor.

Check connection of the force sensor and force sensor I/F unit.

Reboot the force sensor and force sensor I/F unit.

5560	Drift correction error.

Execute FSet FS#.Calibrate command	Check connection of the force sensor and force sensor I/F unit.

Reboot the force sensor and force sensor I/F unit.

5570	Force monitor buffer overflow.

Reboot the controller.	Close and re-open the force monitor.

Reboot the controller.

5800	Force control module initialization error.

Reboot the controller.	Reboot the controller.

Initialize the controller firmware.

Replace the controller.

5801	Force control module memory allocation error.

Reboot the controller.	Reboot the controller.

Initialize the controller firmware.

Replace the controller.

5802	Force control module internal calculation error.

Reboot the controller.	Reboot the controller.

Initialize the controller firmware.

Replace the controller.

5803	Association error of robot and force sensor.

Check the configuration of force sensor.	Check the configuration of force sensor.

5810	Specified value is out of allowable range.

Check the parameter range.	Check the range of the specified parameter.

5811	Specified value of force data is out of allowable range.

Added data 1: Property.

Added data 2: Axis. Check the parameter range.	Check the property of force control object.	1：Number

2:CoordinateSystem

3:Enabled

4:Mass

5:Damper

6:Spring

7:TargetForcePriorityMode

8:TargetForce

9:LimitSpeed

10:LimitAccel

5812	LimitSpeed or LimitAccel of force data Lower than speed or accel of robot.

Check the parameter.	Check the values of Speed, SpeedS, SpeedR, Accel, AccelS, AccelR, LimitSpeed and LimitAccel.

5813	Enabled of force data is all false.

Set true to 1 or more axis.	Check the enabled property of the force control object.

5814	Cannot Ty_Enabled or Ty_Enabled are true.

Check the parameter.	Turn off the Ty_Enabled and Tz_Enabled property.

5815	Specified value of force trigger data is out of allowable range.

Added data 1: Property.

Added data 2: Axis. Check the parameter range.	Check the property of force trigger object.	1:Number

2:ForceSensor

3: CoordinateSystem

4:TriggerMode

5:Operator

6:Enabled

7:FMag_Axes

8:TMag_Axes

9:Polarity

10:UpperLevel

11:LowerLevel

12: UpperLevel smaller

than LowerLevel

13:LPF_Enabled

14:LPF_TimeConstant	1:Fx

2:Fy

3:Fz

4:Tx

5:Ty

6:Tz

7:Fmag

8:Tmag

5816	Specified value of force coordinate system data is out of allowable range. Added data 1:

Property.

Added data 2: Axis. Check the parameter range.	Check the property of force coordinate system object.	1:Number

2:Position

3:Orientation_Mode

4:Orientation_UVW

5:Orientation_RobotLocal	1:X

2:Y

3:Z

or

1:U

2:V

3:W

5817	Specified value of force monitor data is out of allowable range.

Added data 1: Property.

Added data 2: Axis. Check the parameter range.	Check the property of force monitor object.	1:Number

2:ForceSensor

3:CoordinateSystem

4:FMag_Axes

5:TMag_Axes

6:LPF_Enabled

7:LPF_TimeConstant

5818	Specified value of force motion restriction data is out of allowable range.

Added data 1: Property.

Added data 2: Axis. Check the parameter range.	Reboot the controller.

Initialize the controller firmware.

Replace the controller.

5819	Specified duration of FCKeep is out of allowable range.

Check the duration range.	Check whether the specified duration is 600 seconds or less.

5830	Force control cannot resume from the pause. Abort the motion.	Abort the motion.

5832	Cannot Execute normal motion command during force control.

Exit the force control in FCEnd.	Check whether the motion command right after continuing the force control by CT does not contain force control.

5840	Force sensor in use.

Cannot execute the sensor command when other tasks are using the force sensor.	Check whether the Reset property or Reboot property of the force sensor object are executed in another task.

5901	Failed to create the memory mapped file.	Reboot the controller.

Initialize the controller firmware.

Replace the controller.

5902	Failed to delete the memory mapped file.	Reboot the controller.

Initialize the controller firmware.

Replace the controller.

5903	The specified robot cannot be found.	Reboot the controller.

Initialize the controller firmware.

Replace the controller.

5904	Duplicate allocation of the force data area.	Reboot the controller.

Initialize the controller firmware.

Replace the controller.

5906	Specified force data number cannot be found. Specify a valid force data number.	Reboot the controller.

Initialize the controller firmware.

Replace the controller.

5907	Specified force data number was not defined.

Specify a teach force data number.	Specify a defined force data number.

5908	Specified force coordinate system data number was not defined.

Specify a teach force coordinate system data number.	Specify a defined force coordinate system data number.

5909	Specified force data can't be updated.	Specified force data can't be updated nor deleted by FSet,FDel, MPSet, or MPDelcommand.

5910	Specified force data value is out of allowable range.	Specify the value within the range.

5911	The Upper level value is smaller than the lower level value.

Change the upper and lower level values.	Change the upper and lower level values.

5912	The number of specified command parameters is not correct.

Specify a valid number of parameters.	Specify a valid number of parameters.	Number of parameters

5913	The number of specified function parameters is not correct.

Specify a valid number of parameters.	Specify a valid number of parameters.	Number of parameters

5914	The type of a specified command parameter is not correct.

Specify valid parameters.	Specify valid parameters.

5915	The type of a specified function parameter is not correct.

Specify valid parameters.	Reboot the controller.

Initialize the controller firmware.

Replace the controller.

5918	Specified force data label cannot be found.

Specify a valid force data label.	Specify a defined valid force data label.

5921	Duplicate force data label.

Specified label name is already used.

Change the label name.	Change the label name.

5924	Force data memory area for the specified robot is not allocated.	Reboot the controller.

Initialize the controller firmware.

Replace the controller.

5927	Cannot read the force data from the force file.	The force data is invalid and cannot be read.

Re-create the force file.	0：FC

1：FCS

2：FT

3：FM

4：MASS	Force

data

number

5928	Force data area is allocated beyond the available force data number.	Reboot the controller.

Initialize the controller firmware.

Replace the controller.

5929	Specified force file name is not correct.

Specify a valid force file name.	Reboot the controller.

Initialize the controller firmware.

Replace the controller.

5930	Specified force data label is beyond the maximum length.

Specify a valid force data label.	Specify a valid force data label.

Refer to "Label Property" for details.

5931	Description for the specified force data is beyond the maximum length.

Specify a valid description.	Specify a valid description.

Refer to "Description Property" for details.

5932	The force file is corrupted.

Check sum error.	Cannot load the force file because it is corrupted or was edited by tools other than Force Guide.

Re-create the force file.

5933	Specified force file cannot be found.

Specify a valid force file name.	Specify a valid force file name.

5934	Cannot save the force file.	Make an enough space to write the force file.	Robot number

5940	The force data label is not correct.

Specify a valid force data label.	Specify a valid force data label.

Refer to "Label Property" for details.

5941	The force data label is not correct.

Specify a valid force data label.	Specify a valid force data label.

Refer to "Label Property" for details.

5943	Invalid a force file version.	Cannot load the force file because it is a newer version.

5944	The force file format version is unsupported.	Cannot load the force file because the format is not supported.

9007	Initialization failure.

Failed to initialize the force sensor I/F unit.

Check the force sensor I/F unit power and the connection.	Error 2847-2857 of force sensor I/F unit or the force sensor has occurred.

Please confirm the system history, and take a relevant countermeasure
